[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A grayscale anime-style close-up shows a pair of hands near a face with overlaid, partially cropped blocky text across the top and bottom of the image.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a close-up of an illustrated face and hand(s). The lower portion shows a light-colored hand with visible finger outlines extended toward the center-right area, while the left side shows part of an illustrated face with shading around the cheek and mouth area; an eye is not clearly visible.

Setting:
The image appears to be a stylized digital illustration with no real-world setting, presented against a flat, dark-to-light monochrome background.

Visual Details:
The artwork is in black, white, and gray tones with smooth shading and clean linework. The hand is drawn with distinct finger segments, and the face is partially visible on the left, with the mouth area and chin shaded. The composition is tightly cropped, and bright white, bold, blocky text overlays the image at the top and bottom; the text is partially cut off by the image edges and is not fully readable. The top overlay begins with characters that appear like “KSHWHWHW…” and the bottom overlay contains segments that look like “KINGQLSKWUWK…”.

Visible Text:
Top overlay text (partially visible): “KSHWHWHWQL”
Bottom overlay text (partially visible): “KINGQLSKWUWK”

Practical Summary:
The image shows a grayscale anime-style close-up of an illustrated face and an extended hand. Large, bold, partially cropped text overlays the top and bottom of the picture.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

`KSHWHWHWHW RQL`  
`KINGQLSKWUWK`  

# Structured Version

Text appears to be stylized/fragmented (possibly cut off from a longer string). Extracted visible character sequences:

- `KSHWHWHWHW RQL`
- `KINGQLSKWUWK`

# Notes

- The screenshot text is partially obscured/cropped, so it may be incomplete.
- Spacing and exact character boundaries are unclear in places; `[unclear]` is not used because the visible characters are preserved as-is.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
